topic: A grandfather clock chimes thirteen at midnight and on the thirteenth something moves.
title: My Grandfather Clock Chimes Thirteen At Midnight | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My grandfather clock chimes thirteen at midnight, and on the thirteenth, something moves.
scenes.image_prompt: a tall antique grandfather clock in a dim hallway, pendulum mid swing, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It came with the house, too heavy to ever move out.
scenes.image_prompt: a large wooden grandfather clock against a wall in an old dark living room, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: For years it kept perfect time.
scenes.image_prompt: a close framed antique clock face with ornate hands, dim warm light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then one midnight I counted the chimes. There were thirteen.
scenes.image_prompt: a grandfather clock with hands near twelve in a dark room, faint glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: On the final chime, the front door unlatched.
scenes.image_prompt: a front door slightly ajar in a dark entryway, fog beyond the gap, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It only chimes thirteen once a month, on the thirteenth.
scenes.image_prompt: a wall calendar with the thirteenth circled, beside a dim clock, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So that night I sat in the dark and waited.
scenes.image_prompt: a person seated in a dark room facing a tall clock, back to camera, faint light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At the thirteenth chime, the pendulum stopped, and footsteps crossed upstairs.
scenes.image_prompt: a still grandfather clock pendulum frozen mid swing, dark staircase behind, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every thirteenth, the steps came lower, one floor closer to me.
scenes.image_prompt: a dark staircase leading down into a shadowed hallway, faint light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last thirteenth, the chimes rang while the footsteps stood right behind my chair.
scenes.image_prompt: a chair in a dark room facing a clock, a long shadow stretching across the floor behind it, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I stopped the clock myself. I removed its hands.
scenes.image_prompt: a grandfather clock with its glass open and hands missing from the face, dim light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Tonight at midnight it chimed thirteen anyway, and the door is open again.
scenes.image_prompt: an open front door at midnight, fog rolling into a dark entryway, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
